faqs.question: What does general pest control service include in Baldwin?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service includes a thorough inspection of your Baldwin property, treatment for common pests like ants, roaches, spiders, silverfish, and earwigs, exterior perimeter protection, and interior spot treatments as needed. We also provide prevention recommendations specific to your property.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $175 to $300?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on several factors including your property size, the severity of the infestation, the types of pests present, and whether you need a one-time treatment or ongoing service. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work in Baldwin.

faqs.question: How often should Baldwin homes get pest control treatment?
faqs.answer: Most Baldwin homes benefit from quarterly pest control treatments to maintain year-round protection against Long Island's seasonal pest activity. However, some properties may need monthly service during peak seasons, while others do well with bi-annual treatments. We'll recommend a schedule based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for families and pets in Baldwin?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family and pets. Our technicians are trained in the latest application methods that effectively eliminate pests while minimizing exposure. We provide specific safety instructions for each treatment and can discuss pet-friendly options during your consultation.
